text.en: The Transformer replaced recurrence and convolution with self-attention as the core sequence modeling mechanism.
text.zh: Transformer 用自注意力作为核心序列建模机制，替代了循环和卷积。

text.en: The architecture became a foundation for scalable pretraining and later large language models.
text.zh: 该架构成为可扩展预训练和后续大语言模型的重要基础。
